mapper.select: /* 포인트: 잔액 조회 (버킷별 원장 합계) */ SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN PT_LDG_PT_TYPE_CD = 'PTLC0001' THEN PT_LDG_AMT END), 0) AS availableAmt, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN PT_LDG_PT_TYPE_CD = 'PTLC0002' THEN PT_LDG_AMT END), 0) AS holdAmt, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN PT_LDG_PT_TYPE_CD = 'PTLC0003' THEN PT_LDG_AMT END), 0) AS settleableAmt FROM POINT_LEDGER WHERE USR_SN = #{usrSn}

/* 포인트: 원장 목록 (한글명 조인, 최신순 100건) */ SELECT L.PT_LDG_SN AS ptLdgSn, L.USR_SN AS usrSn, L.ACTOR_USR_SN AS actorUsrSn, L.PT_LDG_REF_TYPE_CD AS ptLdgRefTypeCd, R.CMM_NM AS refTypeNm, L.PT_LDG_REF_SN AS ptLdgRefSn, L.PT_LDG_PT_TYPE_CD AS ptLdgPtTypeCd, P.CMM_NM AS ptTypeNm, L.PT_LDG_TYPE_CD AS ptLdgTypeCd, T.CMM_NM AS typeNm, L.PT_LDG_AMT AS ptLdgAmt, L.PT_LDG_BAL_AFTER_AMT AS ptLdgBalAfterAmt, L.PT_LDG_RSN_CN AS ptLdgRsnCn, L.PT_LDG_REG_DT AS ptLdgRegDt FROM POINT_LEDGER L JOIN CMM_CODE T ON T.CMM_CD = L.PT_LDG_TYPE_CD JOIN CMM_CODE P ON P.CMM_CD = L.PT_LDG_PT_TYPE_CD LEFT JOIN CMM_CODE R ON R.CMM_CD = L.PT_LDG_REF_TYPE_CD WHERE L.USR_SN = #{usrSn} ORDER BY L.PT_LDG_SN DESC LIMIT 100

/* 포인트: 진행 중 거래 문제 건수 (전환 차단 검사, 읽기 전용) */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRADE_DISPUTE D JOIN TRADE T ON T.TRD_SN = D.TRD_SN WHERE (T.SLLR_USR_SN = #{usrSn} OR T.BYPR_USR_SN = #{usrSn}) AND D.TRD_DSP_STATUS_CD IN ('TRDC0016', 'TRDC0017')
